commands.name: venv_prefix
commands.cmd: . .venv/bin/activate && python -c "import sys; assert ".venv" in sys.prefix; print(sys.prefix)"

commands.name: pip_install_requests
commands.cmd: . .venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -q requests==2.32.3 && python -m pip freeze | grep -i requests

commands.name: git_flow
commands.cmd: git init -q && git config user.email t@t.com && git config user.name t && echo hi>README.md && git add README.md && git commit -q -m "feat: init" && git show --stat | head -5
